case_title: ALYSSA WONG VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,172.97 FILED BY WONG, ALYSSA AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF CITY ATTORNEY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-30-2025 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-30-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-30-2025 BY JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID FLEISIG. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF ALYSSA WONG IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO IS PRESENT WITH ASHLEY CARNEGIE APPEARING. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-30-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WONG, ALYSSA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF CITY ATTORNEY STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
